name: S-4 standards-audit --emit writes a markdown audit report with Per-source state heading
command:
printf -- '- id: g
  fetch_frequency: daily
' > cat.yaml && mkdir -p tree/g && printf 'source:
  id: g
rules:
  - {id: r, provenance: [{source: g}]}
' > tree/g/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-audit.sh" --emit report.md --catalog cat.yaml --tree tree && [ -s report.md ] && grep -q 'Per-source state' report.md && echo emitted 1>&2
